name: Corn and Zucchini Saute
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces button or cremini mushrooms, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or wok, melt 3 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add the olive oil and onion, cooking for 3 to 4 minutes until the onion begins to soften.
3. Turn off the heat and add the mushrooms. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms begin to brown.
4. Return the pan to medium-high heat and add the remaining tablespoon of butter.
5. Add the zucchini and cook, tossing the vegetables every minute or so, until the zucchini is cooked through (about 6 minutes).
6. Add the corn and continue cooking until the corn is heated through.
7. Remove from the heat, stir in the dill, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 118 calories, 3 gm protein, 12 gm carbohydrates, 8 gm fat, 16 mg cholesterol, 4 gm saturated fat, 140 mg sodium.
